input.body:
Hi,

      The business case "#{_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"foreach","line":"a623a077","path":["col_title"]}')}" (ID: #{_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"foreach","line":"a623a077","path":["col_caseId"]}')} has been

      Owner: #{_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"foreach","line":"a623a077","path":["col_ownerEmail"]}')}

      Please log in to the LBC system to submit your review.

      — LBC Management System
